detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部研究所碩士班	112學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 海洋事務專題 (Seminar on marine affairs)	開課班級 : 邊境所碩一	學　　分 : 3.0	授課時數 : 3.0
授課教師 : 侯廣豪	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
This comprehensive course presents in-depth analysese of the experiences of fifteenth developed and developing nations and four key regions of the world that have taken concrete steps toward cross-cutting and integrated national and regional ocean policy. This course highlights the serious conflicts of use in most national ocean zones and the varying attempts by nations to follow the prescriptions emanating from the 1982 UN Law of the Sea Convention and the outcomes of the 1992, 2002, and 2012 sustainable development summits. The interrelationship among uses and processes in the coast and ocean requires that ocean governance be integrated, precautionary, and anticipartoy. Overall, the course provides a definitive state-of-the-art review and analysis of national and regional ocean policies around the world. 


2.教學綱要
This course is on the development and implementation of integrated ocean policies at both the national and regional levels.

Policies
